speaker: charlie
text: Thanks Sam, and speaking of perfect conditions, they've got a ripper afternoon lined up at the MCG for the traditional Anzac Day clash. <cite index='32-1'>Essendon and Collingwood are set to lock horns at 3:20 this arvo at the G</cite>, and you know this match always delivers something special. Both teams come in with plenty to prove after mixed starts to the season.

speaker: alice
text: The Anzac Day match is always one of the highlights of the AFL calendar Alex, with that incredible atmosphere and the pre-game ceremony honouring our service members. <cite index='32-1'>It's scheduled for 3:20 PM at the MCG</cite> and you can bet there'll be a massive crowd there to soak up the occasion. These two clubs have such a rich history on this day.

speaker: charlie
text: Absolutely, and away from the footy, we're seeing some great momentum building toward the Brisbane 2032 Olympics. <cite index='38-12'>The upcoming games have already sparked increased investment in grassroots sports infrastructure throughout Queensland and beyond</cite>, which is brilliant for getting more kids into sport. Community participation is at record levels right across the country.
